governanceUpdateNote: On 2026-07-20 the six-PR faction integration batch #40-#45 was completed. The stale superseded PR #29 was closed without merge. Actual GitHub history remains authoritative where legacy roadmap numbering differs.
currentMilestone: Playable three-faction visual baseline and new-game faction selection

currentBatch.extensionReason: The standard six-PR batch fully delivered the coherent faction-selection step; no unrelated extension was added merely to reach eight PRs.

plannedCapabilities: single-player trade center and dynamic market
optionalCapabilities: bot threat, target and recovery planner

deliveredCapabilities: Phaser 4 and TypeScript application scaffold
GitHub Actions CI and GitHub Pages deployment
deterministic simulation commands, events, clock, replay and checksum
IndexedDB persistence core, autosave, manual slots, import/export and recovery
seeded galaxy model
schema-v9 saves with multi-colony, intelligence and debris state
resource economy with energy, population, stability and storage
deterministic building, research, ship and defense queues
serialized fleets with transport, deployment, scout, attack, recycle and colonize missions
deterministic combat, battle reports, debris, plunder and recycling
colonization technology and playable multi-colony empire management
origin-aware fleet logistics planner with cargo, route and fuel validation
generated buildings, ships and defense runtime atlases for Aegis, Synod and Veyra
generated hero, emblem and background art for all three factions
data-driven faction runtime asset registry with explicit technology and effect fallbacks
runtime atlas selection from the player planet factionId
generated faction showcase and faction-aware command-shell theming

full faction-specific mechanics and balance remain scheduled for later faction-content phases

regular logistics routes, planet specializations and the dynamic market are not implemented
autonomous bot planners are not implemented
